subject: refactor(export): clean up dead code, extract helpers, fix inconsistencies
body:
- Delete src/utils/export.js (entirely dead, superseded by ExportButtons)
- Remove unused getPageState prop from ExportButtons
- Extract shared helpers: waitForPaint, hideCanvas, setFullScale
- Pre-compute platformsByCategory and platformGroupsByCategory in
  platforms.js to eliminate duplicate useMemo in components
- Remove pointless categoryOrder alias in ExportButtons
- Extract ChevronIcon component in PlatformPreview
- Inline trivial isCategoryExpanded/isPlatformExpanded helpers
- Consistent export filenames: all use 'canvagrid-' prefix
- Fix useCallback dependency arrays: setPlatform and setExportFormat
  now use [setState] matching the rest of useAdState.js

Tags: cleanup, export, platforms, refactor
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: platform-specs
Semver: patch
